productDisplayName: Little Miss Women Printed Yellow T-shirt
description: Composition Lemon T-shirt made of 100% cotton , has a round neck, short sleeves and rubber with flock print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Mashine wash inside out with similar colours in warm water Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on decorations Get set to have fun and giggle the evening away with this fabulous tee from little miss. The vibrant colours bring out the best in you, while the cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day long. Pair it with capris or shorts for an evening out with the girls.
